1.content: Hearing banging outside his room, Kaidyn opens his eyes. He was awoken from a deep sleep but was unbelievably hungry. He flipped off the covers and sits up. Kaidyn stares down to the foot of his bed where he notices a very wet diaper, secured on his body. To Kady this was...
1.title: The Morning

11.content: Why was I in a wet diaper? Before you could recall, your door opened- who was it?
11.title: A Shock

111.content:
You try to cover up as she approaches you. You clutch onto the blanket as she approached your bed. She put her hands underneath your arms and started to lift you.

You start to interject but she shushes you, now holding your entire body. Your legs hang slightly off the ground, as your mom is not that much taller than you but it was clear that she was still fairly strong. You were still clutching the blanket.

Her arms now moved underneath your diapered bottom, while she lifted your legs- instinctively, you wrapped your legs around her, now being carried at her hip.

She started walking towards the door- you were so confused. "Let me get changed first" you exclaim.

Your mom just kept walking. "We can get you changed in a little bit but we have to go now, we don't want to be late."

Your mom carried you all the way to the car, where she sat you in
111.title: Mom

choices: It was just you and mom
Your sisters were also in booster seats

1112.title: a booster seat

11122.content:
Your sisters were staring at you, Kayla was sitting in the front seat, Kyra in the middle seat, and Kylie on the other side of her.

You looked at them, as they stared back at you. They didn't look terribly confused, you on the other hand were.

Your mom quickly started the car and pulled out of the driveway. No words were said, while your mom sped down the street.

Finally you asked, "where are we going?"
11122.title: Your sisters were with you

1112232.content:
Your mom said that you were going to Kylie's soccer game and you were running behind. You looked back at Kylie, who was in her uniform- ready to play.

Again, nobody said anything about you but they could all clearly see that you were in a diaper and in a booster seat. So you finally just ask, "why am I wearing a diaper?"
1112232.title: Kylie's Soccer Game

11122321.content:
"I explained it to you last night, while I was putting a diaper on you but wasn't sure how awake you were. Let's just remind everybody one more time." she said, speaking to get all of our attention.

"So grandma and grandpa are a little old fashioned. They think the oldest boy should serve their country but we want Kady to go to college, so they need a reason for him not to- or they would disown us. So anytime we see them, we just need to convince them that Kady is still underdeveloped. Luckily, we haven't seen them in a while so they just know that he had issues during birth which stunted some development (which is why I was so short)- we are just going to exaggerate a little bit"

We were essentially lying to my grandparents, just to be able to stay in their will. "So why am I wearing them now?" you ask.

"Well they aren't doing so well, so they are getting their stuff around and wanted to see everybody one last time, so they made a special trip down. They are meeting us at Kylie's game and then will be staying with us for the week."

The week!?

Your mom pulled into the parking lot and parked the car. She opened your door and started to unbuckle you. "Uh hello?" you asked, referring to your diaper situation.

"Oh yeah." Your mom exclaimed, reaching into what could only be called a diaper bag. She pulled out a pair of shorts and slid them up.

"Mom can you at least get me a fresh diaper?" you asked, annoyed that you even had to.

"Sweetie, just wait a few minutes. Then I can change you will Nana here and it will make our story even more believable."

"Mom, I don't want to. What about my friends or Kylie's friends, or the parents at our school. This is humiliating."

"Sweetie, they won't even be able to tell. They will only know if you make a big deal about it or they know what to look for."

I slid the shorts up, over my diaper and started to walk. My sandals were loudly flopping but I could still hear the crinkle over the noises. I asked mom if she could hear it but she said she couldn't. We paid at the gate as Kylie sprinted around. We went to sit down in the stands.
11122321.title: "I'm glad you asked"

111223212.content:
Luckily the place was not very full. There were basically just the families of the players from both teams- being a Saturday morning eighth grade soccer game was working out in my favor. We went and sat in the corner of the stands, away from everybody. As the game got closer to starting, we saw Nana and Papa walking our way.

They approached us, giving mom a hug. Then moving down the line, commenting on how big we have all gotten. For a moment, it felt like everything was going to be fine... but just for a moment.

Everything came crashing back when Nana specifically mentioned my "issues", when asking how about things have been. My issues were just that I was a little undersized and that I needed a little extra help in school, but those were obviously being exaggerated.

"Speaking of issues, somebody's diaper is having some issues." Nana said.

"Well, I better go fix that, come on buddy." Mom said
111223212.title: The stands were basically empty

choices: Somebody else comes in the bathroom
1112232122.content:
Nana said, grabbing my hand. I tried to slip away, but she had a strong grip. I followed mom, not entirely sure where I was going. I was led to the restroom, where again, I was very fortunate this was an empty stadium.

I stopped as mom walked into the girls bathroom- Nana began to drag me in with her. Mom grabbed my hand and led me into the last stall, while Nana went into the second to last stall, closing the door behind her.

I was free. Mom and Nana began talking, while mom opened a table from the wall. She then lifted me from under the arms and sat me on the table. The table was surprisingly sturdy, as mom began digging through the diaper bag.

As she pulled out my diaper and started to pull down my shorts, I heard Nana flush the toilet.
1112232122.title: "I'll come with"

11122321222.content:
She knocks on the stall door, which Mom then opened up. Nana stared, as mom came back to the table.

"I didn't even know they made kid diapers that big." Nana said.

"Well, we get them from a special store- the doctor's said that "fun" diapers will make the experience less traumatic for him..." she responded.

Less traumatic... yeah right. She continued to explain some nonsense about how bright colors stimulate my brain, signaling my brain to release chemicals, and some other nonsense. I was trying to hurry this process along but Nana was more interested in everything.

"Why are there four tapes?" she said, now digging through my bag. Mom explained that the diapers were designed to hold more than a babies, which makes it so we don't have to change every half hour. I was grateful we wouldn't be doing this often, it was becoming humiliating.

Nana started pulling stuff out of the bag, starting with the blanket that she had made me when I was a kid. It had cartoon construction trucks and tractors all over it, I had not seen that in a very long time. Nana looked happy to see it, saying that it held up well.

She continued, and I also watched, curious what mom had put in this bag. There were a two more diapers in the bag, Mom already had the wipes and powder on the table. There was a container of baby puffs- which mom explained were still my favorite snack. I hadn't had them in years, so I was doubtful. Nana continued.

There was a pacifier, which mom explained that I used it to calm down still, as I had anxiety issues. I didn't but I just sat there silent, hoping that I wouldn't have to deal with that thing. There was also a sippy cup with milk in it, that I was hoping not to use. I would just have to remind myself not to say I am hungry while at the game.

Nana then pulled out a light blue jacket, which was one of my favorites. She also pulled out a pair of black track pants. Finally, she pulled out a pair of socks that were unfamiliar to me but looked like they had cartoons on them.
11122321222.title: She comes in the stall

111223212221.content:
Nana suggested that I put on warmer clothes, since my hand was freezing when we were walking. She was right, I was kind of cold- and the added clothes might help cover the diaper better.

Mom agreed and put the pants on over my diaper and shorts. She then grabbed the socks and slid them on my feet, I looked down and saw what cartoons were on them. They were Paw Patrol socks! I started to tell mom that I didn't want socks on but Nana interjected. "You were cold honey, you need them."

Mom held my jacket up as I slid my arms through, she then zipped the jacket up, having me hop down from the table. She packed up and then grabbed my used diaper. Nana grabbed my hand.
111223212221.title: Nana suggests to dress warm

choices: Nana asks if I am hungry

I kept walking with my head down, looking at my socks through my sandals. I was hoping nobody could tell. My mom placed the diaper in the trash and then washed her hands.

We walked all the way back to the stands, I sat as far in the corner as possible.

1123.title: Kyra

Your grandma was there. Your mom's sister and her husband, with their 2 daughters (4 and 7) were also there. Walking in the door was your mom's younger brother, his wife, and 4 sons (newborn, 2, and 6 year old twins). And behind them , your mom's older brother and his son (15) and his wife, her three daughters (11,15, and 17) and her son (17).

Trying to put Kyra in front of you to hide your diaper, you end up getting separated due to hugs and greetings. Hugging everybody, some forced and some meaningful, you become confused. Nobody seems to be acknowledging your diaper, unless they were giving it a pat during the hug or when you turned away.

You know that this is the first time you have been in a diaper since you were a child but everybody is acting like its normal. Eventually, you all get gathered in the living room- you are confused why everybody is here. Your mom, sitting on the couch, pulls you onto her lap- hugging you and bouncing her knees up and down.

Why was everybody here?

I put you in one while you were sleeping
1123322.content:
It was not a happy occasion, grandma informed us that since grandpa had passed away- it was time to put her will in order. Since it really didn't involve the kids, that we should go outside and play- reconnect since it has been so long since we have seen each other.

The group got up and headed towards the front door, mom gave me a kiss on the cheek and told me to go outside. Finally, I had time to get a word in, although it was on word- I looked at her and just mouthed "diaper?".

She nodded her head and stood up but not before exclaiming "I'll be right back, I have to go give Kady a change real quick." The adults nodded as Mom grabbed my hand and led me towards my room again. She told me to lay down on the bed and went over to my closet- she returned with another diaper!?!

Finally, I snapped. "Mom, I am 17- I don't need a diaper, why am I even in one right now? And why did I have to be in one in front of everybody?"

She looked at me calmly.
1123322.title: Grandpa' passed away/will reading

Wake up (it was all a dream)
11233221.content:
She said nothing, as she popped a pacifier in my mouth. I was apalled and tried to spit it out but it was immediately replaced. After the 4th time, I quit and left it in. She proceeded to lift my legs and slide the old diaper out, replacing it with a new one. After a few wipes and some powdering, she taped up the new diaper.

She then grabbed my arms, sitting me up. She then went over to my dresser and returned. "Arms up!" she commanded. "Mom what is happening?" I tried to murmer through my pacifier. She just started back at me and repeated the word up. I lifted both of my hands, as she grabbed my shirt and brought it up over my head.

She then opened up a different shirt and put that over my head. She reached into the arm holes and pulled my hands through.She then gave me a gentle shove, making me lay back down. Reaching underneath me, she pulled the back of the shirt and then snapped it to the front. I was in a freaking onesie....

It was covered in cartoon trucks and cars. She then grabbed my foot and started to tickle it, causing me to laugh- even though I didn't want to. She then put paw patrol socks on my feet before tickling my sides. This time I laughed enough to pop out my pacifier.

She picked it up and tied something around it before popping it back in my mouth and clipping it to my shirt. Sitting me back up, she reached over to my nightstand and grabbed a half empty baby bottle full of water, "let's get this filled up and then get you outside with your sister's."

She grabbed my hand and dragged me in the hall.

I spit my pacifier out and started yelling. "But mom, I don't want to" I said repeatedly, while pulling the opposite way.

"The adults have to take care of some business, go play with your sisters and cousins, then you can come back to Mommy when we are done." she replied.

I plopped on the floor, refusing to go. That was met with three hard spankings. I was on the verge of tears before and even though the diaper prevented those from hurting, it set me off. I started to bawl.

Mom just kind of scooped me off the floor and onto her hip- placing my pacifier back in my mouth. I was now being carried into the kitchen. I put my head down on her shoulder, still crying.

"Aw what happened sweetie" I heard my grandma say, approaching me and my mom, rubbing my back. "Is Grammy's boy still sleepy?" she asked. I was defeated.
11233221.title: Put a pacifier in my mouth

1123322113.content:
She sits you down next to Kylie, handing you a piece of chalk. "Now draw Mommy a pretty picture and I'll come out and see it when we are done. Are you okay with them all by yourself Ky?"

Kylie nods and your mom leaves. "Kylie, what is going on?" you ask. She ignores you.

"Kaidyn wears diapers?" one of the twins asks.

"I guess so." You hear her reply.

"No I don't" you shout, "do I look like I need diapers?" you say, pointing at yourself.

"Then why do you have one on?" The other twin asks.

"I don't know!" you shout.

"So you don't use them?" The first twin asked.

"No!" you say in a loud tone.

"Yeah huh, you were really wet!" the second one replied, reminding you that you in fact did wet your diaper this morning, for some reason.

You return your focus back to Kylie, saying her name. She just pops your pacifier back in your mouth. You know people can understand you ,so you shake her shoulder, repeating her name through the pacifier until she gives you her attention.

"Look dude, I don't know what I am supposed to say. Mom told us that you were going to be treated like a baby and even though she didn't understand it- that's how it was going to be for a while. She just told us to treat you accordingly."

"What does that even mean? Why?"

"I don't know, and I am not sure I should even be talking to you about it- I thought it was your choice but if it's not, I don't want to get in trouble for breaking whatever rules you guys have."

You continue to prod her with questions but she just ignores you. Shaking her again causes her to slap your hands and say no. You sit down and cross your arms. Why is this happening and what did she mean?
1123322113.title: With Kylie, who was in charge of the littles

11233221132.content:
You get up and start to walk towards Kyra. Kylie asks where you are going but you ignore her and keep walking. Approaching the circle, the girls look over at you. Kyra wraps her arms around you, "did somebody need a squeeze from his big sissy?" she asks in baby talk.

Before you could say anything, one of the girls asks what is going on. "Well honestly not sure, mom just told us that we were going to have a new baby brother. We thought she was pregnant but she said it was going to be Kady. And she said that she wanted us to treat him like one, said that he wanted it but might get embarrassed and deny it so we would have to be consistent to make him happy."

You started to interject that it was a lie. That only prompted Kyra to say that was what your mom meant.

"Oh. Dad said that Kaidyn was going to be dressed in diapers and told us to not make fun of him." One of your cousins said. Added with, "yeah, I think his exact words were that if we made fun of him, we would be in diapers with him." another one added. The girls giggled.

"Well maybe it wouldn't be so bad, if you end up as cute as our little baby" Kyra said pinching your cheeks.

"I thought it was some weird fetish" you heard one of your cousins say, followed by laughter again. Finally, you get a word in, "I don't want to be a baby!"

The girls just laugh at you, "Yeah, that's what she said you were going to say. But hey, it might work out for you- I put you on my story this morning and a friend of mine said you were lowkey cute." a cousin laughed, taking another photo of you. "Hey baby, put your paci in so I can send her another one." You shake your head no but feel Kyra shoving it in your mouth. You purse your lips, making sure it doesn't get it. "It's fine, we don't want him to throw a temper tantrum" she says.

Your 15 year old cousin comes over, grabbing on to your onesie. "Dude, this is a legit baby onesie. Does baby like his trucks?" She finished, again using baby talk.

The cousin who took the photo showed you her phone, it was a message that said, "ngl hot. Peep the socks tho" reminding you of your paw patrol socks. You give up trying to get an answer from Kyra.

112332211321.content:
You go back with Kylie because she at least wasn't making fun of you and you were not in a position to explain yourself to the older kids- that you didn't even know that well. They were your cousins but you rarely saw them.

You sit back down on the concrete and grab a piece of chalk. You start drawing a bunch of random things, watching the kids drawing next to you. The twins were tracing each other, the 4 year old was drawing something but you couldn't tell what and your sister was drawing a dog with the 2 year old on her lap still.

You had to figure out what was happening. So far, the only thing you know are that your grandpa died, your mom told your sisters that you were going to be a baby and that your cousins were informed before getting her. So this was planned and by judging by your clothes, it was planned in advance.

There wasn't much more to go on. You hear the door open and you mom comes out, telling you all that it is fine to come in. The older kids stayed outside but parents were coming out to get the littles from Kylie. Your mom thanks her for watching them and she heads over to where Kyra was standing.

Your mom stands over you, "look how many pretty pictures you drew mommy!"

You start to complain that you aren't a baby, but she forcibly shoves your pacifier in your mouth.
112332211321.title: Go back with Kylie

1123322113211.content:
You are brought back inside and carried at your mom's hip. You start to try to question her but anytime you try to take the pacifier out, it gets popped back in. Your mom was purposefully ignoring you. She was in the kitchen, trying to help get the food around but it was obvious that you were not making her life easier. Eventually, she called for Kayla.

Kayla came over and took you from mom's hip and walked you back out to the living room. You hadn't had a chance to talk to her yet, so you tried your luck. Luckily, she had a lot more information than your sisters.

"Well you see, grandpa was an old school guy. So it was his belief that all the oldest sons should enlist to help their country- unless they weren't able to- so in order to stay in the will, mom needed a reason for you to not enlist next month."

"And she came up with this?" you ask, not excited.

"Well, we haven't seen our family in a while and she didn't know what would be a valid excuse- the entire family knew that your development was going to be stunted because of your birth so she just kind of exaggerated what happened. There was a little bit of arguing during the will reading, since your Uncle was mad that Jim was going to have to enlist but you weren't- but Nana argued that Jim was lucky he was able to grow up and not be in diapers still and that was that- so it worked, at least."

You couldn't believe what you were being told. And mom couldn't have at least told you? It was super embarrassing but you considered that the alternative was enlisting, so maybe it wasn't so bad. All of a sudden, you were hit with the need to go to the bathroom and asked Kayla to let you down.

"Buddy, that doesn't fit the narrative..." she replied. It wouldn't have mattered anyways, as you were already going- with tears in your eyes. "Don't cry, there was no way you were going to control it. Mom had to find a way to sell it to our family, so she put diuretics in your drink last night and today.

She drugged you?!?

"It just increases urine production, you will be fine. And would you have played along if she asked?"

Honestly, you probably wouldn't. "But if you are on board now, then she won't have to."

You stopped crying and started to wipe your tears. You shook your head yes, saying you are on board. "Great, just have to let the laxitives do their work and then you will not need any more assistance..."

Laxitives?!

Your thoughts were interrupted by the call for lunch. You were carried to the dining room and sat down

By the time you made it up the steps, she was talking with the older group of kids. You were getting the evil eye from a few of them. Kayla pulled you in towards her, as you heard the conversation. They were asking who got what, and Kayla was filling them in.

Finally, your cousin Jim- who was around your age looked at you. "You're lucky you don't have to enlist." Hailey spoke up, "well I am sure you could pull off the diaper just as good as he does," with a chuckle. "He is clearly faking it" your other cousin Bailey chirped.

"I can assure you, he is not faking it. I mean, nobody would trade off his situation to just avoid enlisting" Kayla rebutted.

"I mean, why is our family even that archaic. I mean, who in their right mind would write their family out of a will just for not serving their country. Couldn't we sue or something." Jim put his head down.

"Dad already looked into it, too expensive and not guaranteed to work- guess you will just have to suck it up." Hailey responded.

"...unless you can convince grandma that you have a reason that it would be impossible for you to enlist like our baby cousin here." Baily added.

"So when I was shopping, I was looking at all of these diapers that had little kids on the box and there were a couple that said for 125+ lbs. "When I got there, the lady was super nice and she showed me around. They had a few of the same diapers but some new ones. When I told her my concerns and asked which ones held the most, she asked how I felt about prints. I told her that they were for my 17 year old son and he would only be wearing them at home, so she brought me around the corner to this other section that had a ton of diapers and said that even though they were more expensive, these work best. I didn't know what prints you would prefer, so I got you these two"

She opened the trash bag and pulled out two huge packages. The one package said Safari and had cartoon animals and plants all over it, the other said rebel and had skull and crossbones on them. I stared at the two packages not knowing what else to do.

Mom broke my trance, which ones do you like better?

He had gotten used to drinking out of sippy cups- it was one of the many babyish things that he still dealt with at his house. Even though he was the second oldest, he had always been treated younger- not sure if it had anything to do with the diapers and his illness.

He never really argued with it though. He didn't always drink out of a sippy cup but when he was about 8, he spilled his cup on the carpet multiple times one week- so his mom made a rule that all cups either had to stay in the kitchen or have a top. So it just became easier for all of the kids to drink out of them. Kayla used them all the way until her Junior year, when the family had to move because mom had lost her job. They downsized to an apartment that was mostly wood floors, so she convinced mom that her and Kylie didn't have to since their room had no carpet. Kady and Kyra's on the other hand was carpeted, so while Kyra was young enough to still use one anyway, Kady still did to have the option to bring it in their room.

The three girls were drastically different.

Kayla was the superstar- good grades, did sports (dance, cheer, gymnastics, track, soccer), got accepted into a really good college on a track scholarship but could have just as easily done it by her grades. She had a ton of friends and for an older sister, did a really good job with her younger siblings. She was the fashionista of them, saying that one day she would like to create her own clothing line in Paris.

Kylie was the rebel. She was nothing like the other three. She was in sports until Kayla got into high school, because that is when mom stopped making her. She quit dance, cheer, and gymnastics the moment she could. She played one extra year of soccer but quit after that. She was not a total girly girl and had more of a bland style. She definitely had middle child syndrome. She wanted nothing to do with her family.

Kyra was the princess. She got spoiled. She was also in sports but again because mom made them all do it, since she wouldn't have to pay for a babysitter while she took the others to practices and games. She was obsessed with Disney Princesses and still wears a tiara on almost a daily basis. If she is at home, even at 10 years old, you will find her in some sort of Princess dress playing dress-up. She is constantly begging Kylie (and Kayla when she is home) to play with her, needing more attention.

Kady was closest with his sister,
1312.title: a plate of cut up pancakes and sippy cup with milk

And when Kayla wanted to join cheer in 4th grade, Kady became their manager- until the following year when their coach let him join the cheer squad a year early. Again in handme downs- the cheer skirt not being anymore of a problem than his leotard with a sewn on tutu was for dance the year earlier.

Kady idolized Kayla, so if she did it- he was okay with it, no matter the reception he got from the kids at school. He had his older sister (and younger ones too but they weren't as close until Kylie joined the older dance crew as necessity when he was in 7th grade). When Kayla joined track, Kady tried to as well- before getting cut. With his developmental issues, he did not grow to be the athlete she did.

It killed Kady last year when Kayla went to college- he didn't have the greatest relationship with his other two sisters and now he had no protector in the high school. Kylie thought she was too cool for him and would only get upset with him- so Kyra became his goto friend at home.

Anytime Kayla was home, Kady tried to keep her to himself but with his other two sisters, mom, and the occasional friend she brought home- he never felt like he had enough time. After breakfast, he to Kayla's room to see if she wanted to spend some time together.

There was no need for him to dirty another article of clothing. The laundry was piling up as it was and he knew Mom was probably going to have to spend more money than usual at the laundry mat, since Kayla brought home clothes from school.

Plus the diaper was really Kady's only personal style. It seemed like everything else was somebody else's choice. There were a lot more girl clothes in the house because there were more girls but also because he got less handme downs, since most of the boys were his size in middle school- and middle school boys are notorious for rough housing and ripping clothes (usually during football at recess). Kady's only boy clothes were two pair of shorts, two pair of sweatpants, one pair of jeans, one pair of khakis, three tee shirts, one polo, one button up shirt and one sweatshirt. Saving the majority of those for the five days of school and having a back up pair of sweatpants in the nurses office, in case of a leak- boy clothes weren't an option at home and all were handme downs anyways. The majority of the girl clothes were obviously picked out by his sisters, as he was usually too shy to pick through the handme downs in front of the girl or her parents that wore them.

It wasn't like people didn't know though. All of his sister's friends have been around the house and seen him. The occasional week where he went through too many pants so would have to wear girl jeans or sweatpants to school, or the sports. Having limited shorts and t-shirts, cheer practice was almost always done in girl shorts and t-shirts and dance was always done in handme down leotards- disregarding the design. (On a side note- this was the only time Kady was out of diapers, as they limited mobility and pullups did a fine enough job holding for the hour and a half).

Anyways, back to the point. The diapers were exclusive to him. They were fortunate enough to have a local shop that took their insurance, that had printed diapers for adults.They were originally designed for the ABDL community but Kady's mom never explained what that was to him and instead sold him on the fact that they would be a personal style choice for him. The insurance covered the cost for a certain amount of diapers and if it got close to the end of the month and they were almost out, Mrs. Yost would have to pick up a cheap package of normal diapers from the grocery store.

The trip was always done the first weekend of the month and they would go and stock up. Kady would pick out the ones that he liked but then would usually have to settle for a few packages he didn't, as the stock was out of their control. He would usually have enough of the jungle print or boyish/general looking ones for public but would ultimately have a package or two of girly ones. These were the ones he saved for around the house- and instead of choosing himself and admitting to wanting this package, he would leave the choice up to his mom or sisters that were with him.

That resulted in him wearing a bright pink diaper with princesses and horses on them today, but again- they weren't leaving so it didn't matter. He needed to save the rainbow ones for the rest of the month as they were the better option for discretion in public.

Before leaving his room, he pulled out two socks from the sock bin. This was one of the few items of surplus in their house. It seemed that all of them had a liking for crazy socks- so this was the most popular gift for the bunch on holidays and birthdays. You keep your eyes closed, feeling every turn and stop- until you hear your moms voice. "Hey Janice" you hear her say, looking up you see another woman coming down the aisle that you are. You close your eyes even tighter, like that would do anything but inevitably the woman's voice is right next to you.

"Who is this child?" she says as she puts her arm on your shoulder. "This is Kaidyn, can you say hi Kady?" you hear your mom ask. You mummer the word hi, as you pull your blanket to your face. The woman grabs your blankie and tries to wiggle it down. "No need to be shy sweetie..." she says as she causes the blanket to slip out of your hands.

"Oh, I think I've seen that shirt before.." she says, as Moana pokes her head into view. You lean back forward, as your mom takes over the conversation, "Yeah, I think that is one of the clothes we got from Gracie."

"Oh yeah, I forgot about those- so this is your youngest?" she asked. Clearly she knew mom but not a lot about her family.

"Oh no, this is my second oldest." your mom responded.

The lady got quiet before starting back up, "I thought you had older children?"

Mom responded, "well I mean, still in school" she responded before the inevitable question popped up. "How old is she?"

"Well he is 17."

I heard the lady drop something and pick it back up. "He? What is a 17 year old doing in a cart and one of Gracie's shirts?" she asked, almost offended. "I knew the child was big for the cart but I just assumed it was a big child, not a man."

Mom started to explain the whole situation- but was wildly off from the truth, using phrases like "and he doesn't really care about gender norms" and "his choice". Neither of those were true but I just wanted out of there, so I didn't correct her. Then the word diaper came up, causing another gasp.

"I thought that is what it was but it was pink" the woman exclaimed. Your mother without missing a beat, pulled the blanket from you, causing you to reach back for it.

"Yeah there is this store not too far from here that takes our insurance and they sell diapers that are fun- to take the stigma away from them." again that seemed like a lie but you start to believe that she thinks those statements are true herself.

The lady shrugged and nodded. "Well it's not what I expected but I am glad Gracie's stuff could be put to good use. She is growing like a tree, so you might have some new clothes coming your way" the lady said, this time grabbing your foot- you were pretty sure this was so she could those designs too. "Well I should get going, see you Monday" the lady said, as the conversation finally came to a close.

"Oh shoot, well maybe next girls night!" Addy says, in almost a sinister way. She then writes her number on the receipt and tells you to text her. Your mom tells her that you will.

You then head out to the car. You are stuck in the seat as Mom puts the groceries in the trunk. "Okay sweetie, back to the laundry mat to switch the clothes over- we don't have enough room in the car for both, so I guess we will have to head home to drop the groceries off.

You help mom get you out of the cart and you sit back down in the car. Your mom leaves you in the car when she gets out to do laundry.

On the way home, it starts to rain. Your mom gets out of the car and opens your door. "Alright sweetie, its kind of wet so come here." she says, holding her arms out and pulling her towards you. You feel her hands under your armpits, ducking your head. "oops can't forget this,"she says grabbing your cup.

She carries you to the door, probably regretting not letting you grab shoes. She fiddles with the keys, eventually opening the door. "Girls, come grab groceries." she yells. Kylie pops her head up from the couch, along with Steph. Your mom notices, "oh hi Stephanie." she says.

Stephanie waves as Kylie explained that her mom dropped her off and that she was going to spend the night. "That's fine but I need you to come grab groceries." she explained.

"How come Kady didn't have to?" Kylie complains as Kyra and Kayla squeeze through the door.

"Kady does have to, he just has to go get some shoes first..." mom says, mimicking Kylie's whiny tone. "Go get some shoes, " your mom says, patting you on the butt.

You go to the closet and grab your crocs, as Kylie comes up behind you getting her shoes. "Oh Steph, you don't have to help" your mom says, taking her coat off.

"I know but I want to" you hear her say, walking out of the house.

You pass her as she is carrying groceries in and you are going out to get some, "you left our game" you hear her say. You wait until she comes out and you are going in to respond, "yeah mom needed help" you respond, not wanting to tell her you were supposed to take a nap. Again, waiting until the next pass, she responds, "bold choice of an outfit their champ." You blush, again knowing she has seen you in every way imaginable, this wasn't super embarrassing.

This time when you go out, there is nothing left so you grab some from her hands. "You know how laundry day is." you respond. She shrugs, knowing your situation she leaves it alone. "Well we are playing again right now, I'll send you the code." she says. You start to follow her before mom stops you, by pulling the waist of your diaper. "Do you need a change?" she asked while doing this.

It wasn't super noticeable but you were certain you had went when you were out and about but you wanted to go play. "Mom, not now." you respond. She lets go of the diaper, "doesn't look too bad, go ahead- I have to put these away anyways." she says attending to the groceries. You ask mom for your phone and she points up at the counter. You have a message from Steph, which tells you the code to the game.

132231.content:
You head up to your room- usually you have to wait for mom to change you into a new diaper but because you have practice, you wear a pull-up. They allow for more mobility and usually hold for long enough, with the rare occurrence of a leak, which you explain with spilled water or sweat. You rip off your diaper and throw it in the diaper pail, then slide up the pull-up.

Your mom had already put your football pants on top of the dresser, so you slide those up- hiding the Mickey Mouse on the front. A few years ago, there was a chance there would be a Disney Princess on the pull-ups as Kyra was still wetting the bed but fortunately she grew out of that, so you don't have to alternate on which kind mom bought.

You start looking for a tshirt to wear but you went through those during the week. You found a light blue adidas shirt that you were pretty sure Kayla got for Christmas, but it was the best that you could find. You threw it on and went over to the sock bin to find something wearable.

Socks were one of the few items of surplus in their house. It seemed that all of them had a liking for crazy socks- so this was the most popular gift for the bunch on holidays and birthdays. They were cheap and the kids loved them, so almost everyone added this along with whatever other present was bought for them. They had so many, ranging from character ankle socks to knee high fuzzy toe socks. Having so many, finding matches became a chore, so they opted to just pile them in a tub next to their dresser.

Finding socks to wear in front of the football team was normally a chore as it was because they didn't have many- but an additional practice at the end of the week made it nearly impossible. Grabbing the best option, he put on one crew sock with teal mermaid scale design and a pink crew sock with ribbons on it- he figured the guys wouldn't know about the mermaid scale design and could pass the other off as breast cancer awareness, and if all else failed he could say he grabbed two from the dryer and thought his clothes were in them.

With that, he slid on his crocs, grabbed his pads and his cleats, and began walking to practice.

They got through practice without a hiccup. After practice his friend Brett asked if he wanted to hang out. He really did but he also needed to get home and out of his now used pull-up. Brett lived far away and he would need a ride but he wasn't sure his mom would give him one. He knew Brett had a little sister who was in pull-ups, he could just try to bum a few off of her and borrow his clothes.
132231.title: Football Practice

132233.content:
You barely make it into your room, when you hear running up the stares. You turn back and see Steph running up the stairs. She has been Kylie's friend ever since you could remember, even though she was older. Since she has been around forever, she has seen you in every setting, so you weren't embarrassed as she approached you.

"Dude, we have to go. Mom is outside waiting and we are going to be late." You tell her just a second since you had to pick out clothes, "Your gonna be fine, we are just having our walkthrough- coach said PJs are fine, see" she said, pointing to her pajamas that she was wearing which were white with donuts all over them.

You point down to your diaper, letting her know that you need out of that- to which she grabbed a pull-up from your dresser and told you that you could change there.

Usually, you need help changing- since the diapers aren't the easiest thing to put on yourself properly but since you wore pull-ups to sports, that should work.

Steph picks up your gym back with your shoes in it and stuffs the pull-up inside before practically dragging you to the car.

You and Steph both sit in the back seat as you say hello to her mom and thank her for the ride to practice. You guys hit every red light and train, while riding to the school- along with a bumpy detour. You kept moving your hair, as it kept getting in your eyes. While it wasn't terribly long, for guys standards it would be considered. Usually you put product in it, which kept it still but didn't have time to do so this morning. Steph noticed and told you to turn.

You did as instructed and felt her start brushing your hair. When the brush straightened out your naturally curly hair, it went to about your shoulders. All of a sudden, you felt Steph grab the hair from the top of your head and being in a house full of girls, you knew what was coming.

"You are not putting my hair in a ponytail." you say.

"Why not, it is going in your eyes" she said, tucking your hair behind your ears for the moment.

"I am not a girl" you complain.

"Believe me, the hairstyle won't be the concern there," she said referencing your pajamas. "Plus the girls know that and its not like they haven't seen you with makeup on or in girl clothes."

You know she was right. Kyra loved it when you played with her, allowing her to give you make overs or play dressup, and Kylie loved social media. Your mom yelled at her for putting an IG post of you at a tea party with Kyra one time but that didn't prevent her from sending messages to her friends. Plus, when you were short on laundry, you would come to the occasional practice in spandex or booty shorts. All of the girls on the team knew and it wasn't even until right now that you second guessed the pink jammies and fuzzy socks- you were too preoccupied thinking about the diaper and being late.

"I guess you are right, the jammies literally say girls can do amazing things on them. The hair won't be an issue unless I can find another outfit."

"Want to switch jammies?" you ask, which was met by a chuckle. She thought you were joking but you weren't; however, you weren't going to press the issue. "So can I finish?" she asks. You turn back around.

She grabs your hair again, feeling the hair tie grab a few stray hairs and pull. When she is done, you reach to feel it. Your hand is impeded by a giant bow.

"What is this?" you ask, irritated.

"Sorry, I didn't have another hair tie, just my cheer bow." You sigh. But didn't have much time to complain, as you guys pull up to the front door. You thank Steph's mom for the ride again, as you both grab your bags and run into the school.

You forgot to put the strap of your crocs around your heel, so they keep slipping. That paired with your diaper, makes you move a little slow.Steph beats you to the gym door, you following right behind.

You see that the mats were already on the floor and your teammates were stepping into their places. "Finally!" you heard coach yell. You start to head to the locker room, when she stops you. "I need to go change first." you say back.

"It's fine, we are just doing a walkthrough, you don't even need to put your shoes on- let's go!" she commanded. Reluctantly, you put you bag down and walk to the mat. You slide your feet out of the crocs and step on the mat. You step into position and wait for the music to cue.

You start the walkthrough and think that you did a pretty good job. It was hard to get into some of your stances just because you couldn't close your legs but given the circumstances, you were pretty proud. You do the walkthrough twice with no stunts.

Afterwards coach tells the girls that were doing stunts to stick around and the rest of us needed to go set up our area in the cafeteria. I forgot how much work it took to host a competition.

We moved tables around, giving each team a location where they could go when they weren't cheering. By the time we finished that, moms were coming in with coolers and food. Nobody really took notice of me which I was grateful for. Steph's mom came back, putting water she had bought in the cooler.

When the people doing stunts were done, coach met us in our area where she gave us a little pep talk. Since we hosted, we were one of the last teams to go- which meant we wouldn't being going for another 6 or 7 hours probably. While she was talking, other teams were filing into the cafeteria. Girls in sweats and carrying blankets. They also brought in coolers and food to fill their area.

Finally coach broke us down.

"You guys are technically working the event, so if teams need directions or the judges need anything, you guys have to get it. But I want you to sneak out and watch other teams, if you have down time." Coach said dismissing us.

I pulled Steph to the side, "I thought she was going to let us go back home..."

"Yeah so did I, I didn't know we had to work it." she said. Admittedly the last time we hosted was regionals so the tournament provided workers. This was just a regular season thing so we were the workers. "I didn't bring anything, do you think your mom could go home and bring me my uniform and a change of clothes?" I asked.

"She went to my brothers football game. She dropped the water off and left once she found out we had to stay." she said.

I called my mom, who was already on her way to work and Kayla already left to go back to college. I was stuck. I grabbed my bag and started to walk off. "What are you going to do then?" Steph asked.

"Well first I am going to change out of this diaper." You say, kind of loudly but nobody took notice. She stopped me- if you use that now, by the time we go, you will have nothing. She made a valid point but there was a chance that you weren't even performing without a uniform.

you have our only boy uniform." coached informed us.

You put those on which didn't really fit over the diaper. As coach handed you your skirt, she could see that your diaper was bunched up weird.

Coach tells you to take everything off and get changed. You do so and while she does, she reaches into her bag, pulling out extra socks that she always carries with her. This is the most commonly forgotten part of the uniform.

You laugh as she slides your shirt above your belly.

She untapes the diaper-mentioning that she had never seen a diaper with four tapes. Discussing how cute the prints were and talking about how these diapers could fit Jackie and she is a 10 year old! You realized that she thought you were young and suspicions were confirmed when she said that you were a super tall girl and that sports teams will be fighting for you to play for them.

Finally untaping the diaper, she stepped back. "Well there are a couple surprises here..." she said, leaving you laying on the floor totally exposed. "You're a boy?" she asked, you nodded your head. "How old are you?" she asked, you responded 17. She took a deep breath.

"Well, we made it here- I guess we might as well finish. Why didn't you change yourself?" As she lifted your legs and cleaned you up, you explained how you weren't really good at it and that you always get changed by somebody else. She then asked about the pjs- in which you explained your whole situation, financially and with having three sisters.

She finished taping you up and handed you the dirty diaper. "Well bucko, I guess we are finished here. It is a shame since I told Jackie she would have a new friend but I guess Jeremy got one instead- you will have to introduce Jackie to your sisters." She patted you on the butt as you walked the diaper to the trash. The smell of baby powder filled the prior smell of a messy diaper.

You thanked her as she left and shut the door, heading back to the couch.

For months now, Kady has been posting photos and videos under a fake name on social media. It started, when he ran across a video of two girls in diapers- this led him down an ABDL rabbit hole and he found out that people got paid, gifts, and donations for wearing diapers online. He was intrigued and started a fake Tumblr site, where he offered photos for money and it took off!

He started with buying Boys Goodnites at the store and modelling them but eventually his following grew and his followers sent him actual ABDL diapers and clothing- and in return, he would send them personalized videos or put teasers out on IG, Snap, Tumblr, Twitter, etc. And as he never knows when a request will be made, he tries to be diapered up whenever he can- including overnight. Plus it prevents him from having to get up during the middle of the night to go to the bathroom.

He had his own P.O. box where stuff was shipped and while it has been a struggle, has found places to hide this stuff in his room. And nobody knows, well except
145.title: Because he is making money on social media

1451.content:
They obviously knew. And as his following grew, so did his wardrobe. He loved when they sent him gift cards, as he could buy new video games and stuff he actually wanted. He also made a little money from the platforms as well. With his wardrobe growing, he knew he needed some place to hide all of the stuff and decided with some of the money he was making, he should rent out a storage unit.

It took a couple of secret trips from his room to his car but eventually he loaded up and got a storage unit. While unloading his stuff, another idea clicked into his head- he has always heard that the real money was in YouTube- he could set this place up as a make shift nursery and start making videos there.

He quickly changed into a diaper, throwing on a onesie and putting a pacifier in his mouth. Setting up his camera stand, he took a few photos, until he got a post-worthy one. He put it on all of his social media platforms with the caption, "Finally got a space to set up a nursery for video shoots. Need donations but am really looking forward to starting up on YouTube when ready!"

You decide to keep the clothes on, taking a few more photos and videos for your followers- before throwing clothes back over top of them and heading home.
1451.title: his followers (kept a good secret)

14511.content:
As expected, the gifts flooded in to your P.O. box. It took a lot of secret trips and excuses but you spent a lot of time in that storage unit. You were able to cover the floor with multiple alphabet foam floor puzzles. The toughest part for you was putting together a crib that shipped but you were able to piece that together, attaching a mobile to it. There was a toybox in the corner, filled to the brim with kid toys. On the opposite wall, there was a changing table, stacked with diapers.

Hanging from the ceiling, you placed a hammock which contained a bunch of stuffed animals. Your had a dresser, which was full of clothes that your followers had sent you. And you had a rolling rack, where dresses were hung up, full from one end to the other.

They even sent you a new laptop and camera, which you set up in the corner of the room, so that everything was visable. You were able to hook it up, so that you could live stream sessions. You decided to stream on twitch too and stole an idea from your favorite gamers, when somebody donated a certain amount- the computer would read their comment- giving them the ability to "parent" you. You had a feeling that you were going to make a lot of money.

You took a picture of the completed nursery (although you were still receiving things daily to put in there) with an explanation of your plan. Streamers could watch on youtube, which paid per visitor. But you also sent out a link to your twitch channel, which also had content of you playing video games and talked about the donation feature, setting the price at $50 per comment but could obviously donate less or become a subscriber- different tiers costing different amounts.
14511.title: Gifts flood in over the next two weeks

choices: Woke up to banging on storage unit
145111.content:
You had a Saturday off, so Friday night you told your mom that you were going over to a friends for the night. You left the house after dinner and headed to your storage unit. You made sure to add a padlock on the inside, so you locked yourself inside, changing into a Rearz Safari and then put on a pair of blue footed pajamas with cupcakes all over it.

You logged on to the computer a posted that you were going to start your first live stream and to celebrate, it was going to be a 24 hour live stream. You clipped a pacifier to your pajamas and started the stream. Since you posted about it a few days earlier, some of your loyal followers were already joining in. After you saw it was working, you headed over to the toy box and sat down. You grabbed a few blocks and started to make a tower, when suddenly your computer made a noise.

The robotic voice started to read a comment, "Show daddy what diaper you are wearing." You walked over to the laptop and saw that you had gathered a bunch of smaller donations but that somebody just made a $50 one. You stood infront of the laptop and unzipped your onesie and revealed your diaper before putting it back on.

That one comment, led to a frenzy of comments. Comments were coming in so fast, you were struggling to do everything- they ranged from showing off your nursery to getting into seductive poses. This went on for hours. Eventually, it was two in the morning and you were exhausted. You hadn't had a comment in about 15 minutes so you walked over to the camera and told them it was bedtime- you planned to keep live streaming but needed a quick nap. You put your pajamas back on, since you were in a dressup dress as instructed by one of your followers earlier.

You looked at your laptop to make sure it was still working. There had been 38 comments, which put you close to $2000 for tonight alone. That didn't include the subscribers or the smaller donations just for the sake of donating. Your plan was working.

You climbed into the crib with a bottle and stuffed animal, raising the side of the crib. You started the mobile and closed your eyes. You were really excited but also exhausted, so you fell asleep.
145111.title: First Stream

1451112.content:
You woke up, laying in your crib. You were a little cramped, as the crib size was a downgrade from your normal bed- albeit not a huge downgrade, as you only had a twin size bed at your house. You had to tuck your legs to fit, so you sat up. Noticing the bottle, you were thirsty so you began to drink.

Eventually, the water was gone and you wanted to stretch your legs. You slid down the side of the crib and climbed out, stumbling. You laid on the ground and sprawled out, making yourself as stretch out as possible. You felt the urge to pee, so you let it go.

You got back up and headed towards your laptop. There were three paid comments in the middle of the night, that went unfulfilled- as you were sleeping. They more or less just wanted you to wake up and to see your diaper. You scrolled through some of the Youtube live comments, as they weren't paid. Most of them were complimenting you or telling people what they should tell you to do.

You went over to your diaper bag and pulled out the box of pop-tarts that you brought for breakfast. You opened the package and scarfed a few of them down, before heading over to your toy box. There were a couple children puzzles that you decided to open and take a crack at. Overall, it was a fairly relaxing morning- you realized you weren't getting the traffic you were during the night.
1451112.title: Just woke up

14511121.content:
"Good morning baby, lets see your diaper..." the computer read. A new comment came through. You headed over to the camera and unzipped your jammies, revealing your wet diaper. You kept the pajamas off and headed back to your puzzles.

"Uh-Oh, baby needs a change. Change into a new diaper and dress." the computer read again, from the same subscriber. You walked over to the changing table and grabbed a new diaper, this time a Rearz Rebel that was laying on top. Normally you wouldn't change out of the old diaper, as it wasn't filled to capacity so seemed like a waste; however, you now had a ton so you didn't feel too bad about it. You laid on the changing table and removed your old diaper and replaced it with the new one. You bagged the old one and placed it in the trash can that you had brought.

You then walked over to the rack and grabbed one of the dresses hanging. You were not an expert on dresses so you just grabbed one.You assumed that this had to be an abdl specific thing, as there was a ton of frills, ruffles, laces, and bows. You put it on.

"Spin as fast as you can so daddy can see!" the computer read, again from the same person. You started to spin, really fast until you felt yourself getting dizzy. You felt the dress fly up, which was what you assumed the person wanted.

The man kept commenting, starting with little stuff like bending over and progressed to using your diaper and letting him see. For the next few hours, this person dropped nearly $1000 himself on request and demands. You were down for whatever though, as $3000 a weekend was a pretty good deal.
14511121.title: New comment gets read

choices: Decide to AMA with youtube comments
145111212.content:
Eventually the person stopped commenting, leaving you to go back to playing with your stuff. Lunch came, so you ate the sandwich that you packed. Again, it became fairly boring- as people weren't on as much as they were yesterday.

You decide that the 24 hour stream may only be a once in a while thing, although as you found out this morning- you can make money quickly in a matter of few hours.
145111212.title: Person stops commenting

choices: Wake up to banging on storage unit
1451112122.content: With still 5 hours left, you decide that a nap is the way to go. You change out of the dress and just throw a onesie on over the diaper. You climbed back into the crib and eventually fell asleep.
1451112122.title: Nap time

1452.title: his sister (you will pick which one next)

14522.content:
One of your followers requested you send them a video in a school girls uniform, and they paid you big money. So one day, when you thought you were home alone- you snuck into Kylie and Kyra's room, only to see Kylie sitting on her bed- looking at you confused.

Not really sure what to do, you just confessed everything and when she didn't believe you, you showed her proof. She already thought you were a weirdo, but this was over the top. You begged her not to say anything, in which she asked what was in it for her. You negotiated a deal, where she would get a little money from your business venture but in turn would offer up whatever clothes you needed and would even hide some of the more fashionable girl clothes that your fans sent you. She would even record some of the videos, if extra hands were required.

While it wasn't ideal, it was a pretty good deal. And it was nice to have somebody to talk to about it.

One morning...
14522.title: Kylie

1452231.content:
Your mom walk in and you quickly make sure you are covered. "Honey, there is somebody at the door that needs to talk to you." You make out the words that she is saying but are more concerned whether or not she saw your diaper.

"Why didn't you knock?" you asked.

"I did and I said your name but you didn't respond, so I had to unlock the door and come get you." she responded.

You did have a pretty late night but that still doesn't excuse her from violating your privacy I mean the door was locked. Did she see you?
1452231.title: Your Mom

14522311.content:
"So hurry up, get out of that diaper and put some clothes on- we will talk about that later"

You feel flush with embarrassment but get up and change as soon as she leaves the room. You rip the diaper off and put it in the trash can in your closet. You use some wipes, hoping to get the smell off and then throw on a pair of shorts and a shirt.

Downstairs, you see
14522311.title: She did

14522312.content:
Put on some clothes and come down stairs. You don't think she saw you and as soon as she left, you threw on some music. This is one thing you did to try to silence the sound of ripping the tabs off, you folded the diaper and threw it in the trash you had hidden in your closet. You usually sneak out and take that out in the morning but it was going to have to wait. You wiped yourself down with some wipes, hoping it disguises the smell that is usually washed away by your morning shower.

You threw on some shorts and a shirt and went to the living room. You saw
14522312.title: She didn't

choices: I want in on the deal, I need money
You are going to be my baby
14522331.content:
It was Steph, who has been around you ever since she was little. She was one grade older than Kylie but they used to be on the same dance and cheer teams before Kylie quit. Now she is a freshman cheerleader, cheering for your football team. She comes over to your bed and rips off the covers, exposing your diaper.

"Oh my God," she says laughing hysterically. "I thought that was you" she continues. "I was looking through Kylie's IG when I saw she followed somebody that looked like you but was under a different name and when I checked out the posts I couldn't believe it so I had to check."

"How did you even get in here, the door was locked?" I asked, trying to stall to gather my thoughts.

She holds up her bobby pin, "this isn't a bank vault, we have the same locks on our doors inside"

"Now, here's what's going to happen..."
14522331.title: Kylie's BFF

choices: Just don't tell and I'll get you whatever you want
14523.content: Kyra walked in on you, when you were skyping one of your followers. She stared for a minute out of disbelief and you stared back. It couldn't be hard to explain your way out of this, she was only in fourth grade.
14523.title: Kyra

info.brief_description: Kaidyn wakes up diapered, this is his experience... go crazy with it
info.description:
Kaidyn is a 17 year old boy, who wakes up diapered. He is at home with his Mom and three sisters, Kayla (19), Kylie (13), and Kyra (10)- here is his story. Go crazy but leave options for outs...

*No offensive language
*No graphic content
